name: test_verify_csv_report_for_mmr
description:
Test: Generate and verify CSV report for MMR programme.
Steps:
1. Navigate to reports page.
2. Generate CSV report for MMR.
Verification:
- Report is generated in CSV format for MMR.
descriptionHtml:
Test: Generate and verify CSV report for MMR programme.
Steps:

  1. Navigate to reports page.
  2. Generate CSV report for MMR.
    Verification:
  • Report is generated in CSV format for MMR.
statusMessage:
playwright._impl._errors.Error: Locator.click: Error: strict mode violation: get_by_role("radio", name="CSV") resolved to 3 elements:
    1) <input type="radio" value="mavis" class="nhsuk-radios__input" name="vaccination_report[file_format]" id="vaccination-report-file-format-mavis-field"/> aka get_by_role("radio", name="CSV", exact=True)
    2) <input type="radio" value="careplus" class="nhsuk-radios__input" name="vaccination_report[file_format]" id="vaccination-report-file-format-careplus-field"/> aka get_by_role("radio", name="CSV for CarePlus (System C)")
    3) <input type="radio" value="systm_one" class="nhsuk-radios__input" name="vaccination_report[file_format]" id="vaccination-report-file-format-systm-one-field"/> aka get_by_role("radio", name="CSV for SystmOne (TPP)")

Call log:

statusTrace:
setup_reports = None
page = <Page url='https://qa.mavistesting.com/vaccination-report/file-format'>

    @pytest.mark.reports
    def test_verify_csv_report_for_mmr(
        setup_reports,
        page,
    ):
        """
        Test: Generate and verify CSV report for MMR programme.
        Steps:
        1. Navigate to reports page.
        2. Generate CSV report for MMR.
        Verification:
        - Report is generated in CSV format for MMR.
        """
        ProgrammesListPage(page).click_programme_for_current_year(Programme.MMR)
>       ProgrammeOverviewPage(page).verify_report_format(
            report_format=ReportFormat.CSV,
        )
